ValidationRule.description: Point of Contact is mandatory for Closed Won Opportunities
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = False, $User.Alias <> 'IntUser', $User.Alias <> 'guest', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Partner_Opportunity', ISCHANGED(StageName), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Won'), Number_of_IR_35_Tool_Products__c > 0, ISBLANK( Point_of_Contact__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: OV7: The Point of Contact is needed for IR35 Tool Opportunities as the Brand Logo & HEX Code is requested from this user.
